title: Public signal driven by C++ not propagating as expected

features.name: dpi_export_task_driving_internal_reg
features.description: Code should include an exported DPI-C task that drives an internal reg signal which is not marked /*verilator public*/

features.name: alwaysSensitivity_on_dpi_driven_signal
features.description: Code should include an always block with sensitivity list targeting a signal that is only driven by a DPI-exported task

features.name: unmarked_public_signal_driven_by_dpi
features.description: Code should include a signal that is driven by a DPI-exported task but NOT marked with /*verilator public*/
